name: Jackstraw Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove core and stem of apple; leave skin on.
2. Cut apple crosswise into 1/4 rings.
3. Cut each ring into thin sticks about 1/8 inch wide.
4. Combine all ingredients except lettuce in a large bowl.
5. Toss lightly to mix Poppy Seed Dressing thoroughly.
6. Serve over crisp lettuce.
Servings: 8
Food Exchange per serving: 1 Vegetable Exchange, CAL: 39, CHO: 9g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 1g
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt in dressing recipe.
